theme: Cascade A + C synthesis-first across producer / orchestrator surfaces
summary: First execution pass on the audit-v2.7.4-prompting roadmap. Bundles Cascade A (4 patches synthesis-first across producer surface) + Cascade C (1 patch pre-snapshot context capture). Five textual rewrites, zero structural code added. All pass the decisive test. Cascade A — snapshot-brand Step 7 form-fill recap becomes a 4-6 sentence analytical paragraph using schemas (problems_solved, audience.pain, market_context.sophistication, offer_groups[].offers[]) as analytical vocabulary, ends with single confirm question, no score, no field list, no missing-fields block. tour Milestone 7 url-path, setup-brand Step 4, onboard-brand Phase 2 cascade the same synthesis vocabulary across surfaces. Cascade C — tour Milestone 2 path-(a) collects use-case + stack in flowing prose before the URL, writes to operator/profile.json identity.profile + context.stack[]. Snapshot wow lands in a context-aware operator state.

changes.reason: Step 7 rewritten as synthesis-first analytical paragraph. No score, no field list, no missing-fields block. Inferred attributes flagged inline.
Milestone 7 url-path cascades from snapshot Step 7. Milestone 2 path-(a) collects use-case + stack in flowing prose, writes to operator/profile.json.
Step 4 same synthesis-first pattern. finalize-mutation-batch runs BEFORE sending. Exit 2 = revise.
Phase 2 cascades from snapshot Step 7. Drops 'I keep going with integrity check' announcement (validate runs silently).

operator_impact: Day-1 onboarding starts with two flowing context questions before scrape, no URL-first ambush. Snapshot returns as consultant's read on the brand (the stick-solaire pattern), not as field-list recap. Each downstream surface speaks the same synthesis vocabulary. Path leak / score / missing-fields enumeration removed from default operator surfaces.
tested_on: phantom-stress sync — ready for live stress test on a wellness/cosmetic pilot (deferred to v2.8.1)
caught_by: audit-v2.7.4-prompting roadmap, Cascade A + C scope.
known_gaps: Cascade B (audit/curator surfaces) and Cascade D (legacy cleanup) not yet shipped — pending stress test of A on a wellness/cosmetic pilot fresh.
Live test pending — Cascade A behavior under load not yet confirmed.
